description: Your Zotero library contains several duplicate papers with inconsistent metadata. Clean up the library by merging all duplicate items while preserving the most complete information. Ensure the final merged items retain the following metadata: for 'Attention Is All You Need', preserve Volume '30'; for 'Deep Learning' (LeCun), preserve DOI '10.1038/nature14539'; for 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication', preserve Pages '379-423'; and for 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence', preserve Year '1950'. When finished, the 'Duplicate Items' view should be empty.
